## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include the full error message and stack trace if available.

```
paste error here

## Environment

- **Python version:** (run `python --version`)

## Spec File (if applicable)

If the bug involves parsing or generating from a spec, attach the minimal spec that

# paste spec excerpt here
```

## Additional Context

Any other information that might help — related issues, workarounds you tried, etc.
